title: Remove Time from Last Refreshed Label Format
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the 'Last Refreshed' label to show only the date without time, so it is clean and consistent with other date displays.
description: Remove the time component from the 'Last Refreshed' label on the Reports/Dashboards page. The developer suggested keeping time with AM/PM format for use cases where a user returns on the same day, but the decision was to remove time for simplicity.
acceptance_criteria: Last Refreshed label shows date only, no time
Format is consistent with other date displays on the page
ux_changes: Removed time component from the Last Refreshed label; now shows date only.
implementation_notes: Updated the moment.js format string for the Last Refreshed display to exclude time.
comment_summary: Waqar suggested keeping time with AM/PM format but ultimately removed it per Ryan's request.
